summary: Upgraded Skill Store to v1.2.0 with cleanup policy rules, cleanup action fields, owner/reason/replacement/review_due governance fields, and cleanup action page views.
outputs: Skill Store v1.2.0 cleanup governance workflow
checks: Playwright local Skill Store render/detail check
lessons: Cleanup queue needs action ownership and review dates before archive/delete decisions.

action: Skill Store ops integration cleanup audit
summary: Integrated Skill Store into the operations console Skill Store tab, removed token footprint estimate UI/data generation, and produced the first non-Guanlan Top 20 cleanup audit.
outputs: Skill Store v1.2.1 ops-integrated cleanup audit
checks: node --check Skill Store and ops scripts
Skill Store generated data field check
local operations console Skill Store browser check
lessons: Cleanup decisions should not use static token estimates as an operations-facing signal.

summary: Split Skill Store into catalog and cleanup management views, removed five retired store-only delete-candidate skills from .skill-store, and regenerated Skill Store v1.2.2.
outputs: Skill Store v1.2.2 split cleanup management
checks: local operations console split-view browser check
lessons: Skill Store should separate ability catalog browsing from cleanup management so operators do not mix discovery and destructive workflows.

summary: Released Skill Store v1.3.0 with 30-day cleanup observation, manual add-to-cleanup, mark-common recovery, trash staging, permanent trash deletion, and local ops service.
lessons: Skill cleanup needs reversible operator controls: mark common
and permanent deletion must stay separate.

summary: Fixed the PowerShell runner, regenerated the same-date builders viewpoints artifact, and restored the local publish report so Hermes no longer opens the lane repair request.
issues: The task runner invoked the whole node command as one token; after that fix
the publisher reached its dirty-worktree guard.
lessons: Validate the PowerShell runner before assuming the follow-builders skill data is missing.
reusable_rules: Afternoon first-line lane incidents should verify run-follow-builders-skill.ps1 before debugging the skill payload.
